      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Trail Shoes"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="main" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
          "Summit Runner"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="img" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="src" value="shoe.jpg"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="alt" value="shoe"}]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="p" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="class" value="price"}]
          "$129"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="form" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="label" attrs=[]
            "Size"
            element ns=html local="select" attrs=[]
              element ns=html local="option" attrs=[]
                "40"
              element ns=html local="option" attrs=[]
                "41"
          element ns=html local="button" attrs=[]
            "Add to cart"
        "\n"
      "\n"
